text:
Once upon a time in a little village on the edge of the forest, there lived an old man named Oliver. Oliver had seen many things during his long days collecting firewood for the village. One moonlit night, while he was collecting firewood at the edge of the forest, he heard a soft voice.

"Hello...?"

Oliver looked around him. There was only a single branch on the ground and a lonely oak tree. There was nobody around. Perhaps it was just a trick of the wind?

Then his heart stopped.

"What did you say?"

He listened again, his ears twitching. Nothing. Just the wind.

"Listen..."

Now Oliver really listened.

"I hear you."

Oliver leaned closer.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
